_note: auto-rerank baseline (RAG_RERANK_AUTO=on, RERANK_AUTO_MARGIN=0.015). Production operating point: fires on queries where cosine margin between rank-1 and rank-2 < 0.015. Frozen 2026-06-20 on 22-file corpus, 50-case golden set. Hit@5 lower than no-rerank (0.96 vs 0.98) due to 2 retrieval-intent cases where the cross-encoder fires on ambiguous queries and demotes the correct result — documented Category A/B in ADR-0005.
